parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

WITH p AS (SELECT * FROM projects WHERE id = $1::uuid)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'project', json_build_object('id', p.id, 'name', p.name, 'phase', p.current_phase, 'status', p.status, 'has_handover', p.handover_date IS NOT NULL, 'area_m2', p.property_area_m2),
  'briefing', json_build_object(
    'exists', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = p.id),
    'approved', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = p.id AND b.status = 'approved'),
    'has_open_questions', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_array_length(b.open_questions) FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = p.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0)
  ),
  'design', json_build_object(
    'exists', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM design_options d WHERE d.project_id = p.id),
    'selected', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM design_options d WHERE d.project_id = p.id AND d.is_selected = true)
  ),
  'regulatory', json_build_object(
    'tasks_total', (SELECT count(*) FROM regulatory_tasks WHERE project_id = p.id),
    'tasks_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM regulatory_tasks WHERE project_id = p.id AND status NOT IN ('completed','not_required'))
  ),
  'permits', json_build_object(
    'in_progress', (SELECT count(*) FROM permit_applications WHERE project_id = p.id AND status NOT IN ('approved','rejected','withdrawn','expired')),
    'approved', (SELECT count(*) FROM permit_applications WHERE project_id = p.id AND status = 'approved')
  ),
  'materials', json_build_object(
    'total', (SELECT count(*) FROM materials WHERE project_id = p.id),
    'approved', (SELECT count(*) FROM materials WHERE project_id = p.id AND status = 'approved')
  ),
  'cost_estimate', json_build_object(
    'exists', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM cost_estimates WHERE project_id = p.id),
    'has_breakdown', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM cost_estimates WHERE project_id = p.id AND breakdown IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length(breakdown) > 0)
  ),
  'proposal', json_build_object(
    'exists', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM proposals WHERE project_id = p.id),
    'approved', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM proposals WHERE project_id = p.id AND status = 'approved')
  ),
  'contracts', json_build_object(
    'encargo_signed', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contracts WHERE project_id = p.id AND contract_type = 'encargo_profesional' AND status = 'signed'),
    'obra_signed', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contracts WHERE project_id = p.id AND contract_type = 'contrato_cliente' AND status = 'signed'),
    'acta_replanteo', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contracts WHERE project_id = p.id AND contract_type = 'acta_replanteo' AND status = 'signed'),
    'acta_recepcion_provisional', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contracts WHERE project_id = p.id AND contract_type = 'acta_recepcion_provisional' AND status = 'signed')
  ),
  'safety', json_build_object(
    'plan_generated', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM safety_plans WHERE project_id = p.id),
    'plan_confirmed', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM safety_plans WHERE project_id = p.id AND exec_status = 'confirmed')
  ),
  'accessibility', json_build_object('audit_done', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM accessibility_audits WHERE project_id = p.id)),
  'qc', json_build_object(
    'checks_total', (SELECT count(*) FROM qc_checks WHERE project_id = p.id),
    'checks_complete', (SELECT count(*) FROM qc_checks WHERE project_id = p.id AND status = 'complete'),
    'checks_blocked', (SELECT count(*) FROM qc_checks WHERE project_id = p.id AND status = 'blocked')
  ),
  'aftercare', json_build_object(
    'open', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE project_id = p.id AND status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled')),
    'urgent', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE project_id = p.id AND status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled') AND severity IN ('high','critical'))
  ),
  'pathology', json_build_object('findings_total', (SELECT count(*) FROM pathology_findings WHERE project_id = p.id), 'unresolved', (SELECT count(*) FROM pathology_findings WHERE project_id = p.id AND status NOT IN ('resolved','dismissed'))),
  'energy', json_build_object('assessed', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM energy_assessments WHERE project_id = p.id)),
  'home_automation', json_build_object('proposed', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM home_automation_proposals WHERE project_id = p.id)),
  'gdpr', json_build_object(
    'consent_present', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM consent_records cr WHERE cr.client_id = p.client_id AND cr.revoked_at IS NULL),
    'requests_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM gdpr_requests WHERE client_id = p.client_id AND status IN ('pending','in_review'))
  )
) AS audit
FROM p;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'audited', project_id: $('Build Scorecard').first().json.project_id, project_name: $('Build Scorecard').first().json.project_name, audit_summary: $('Build Scorecard').first().json.audit_summary, issues_count: $('Build Scorecard').first().json.issues.length, issues: $('Build Scorecard').first().json.issues}) }}
